commands: chmod +x fix-baseurl.mjs # stub the baseUrl fixer so the dlx stays offline
vp migrate --full --no-interactive # existing Vite+ project: upgrade plus the full setup
cat package.json # vite-plus version upgrade is applied
cat .node-version # .nvmrc is migrated to .node-version by the full setup
test ! -f .nvmrc && echo nvmrc-removed # the original .nvmrc is removed
cat tsconfig.json # tsconfig baseUrl is removed by the full setup
